Catalog/Joint Replacement/Freedom Total Knee System - PS Femoral Component
🦿 ArthroplastyREF: MRL-FTK-002

Freedom Total Knee System - PS Femoral Component

Freedom Total Knee System · Knee Femoral Components

Posterior Stabilized (PS) femoral component for Freedom Total Knee System. Designed for patients with PCL deficiency, providing enhanced stability through cam-post mechanism. Features anatomical design for optimal range of motion and stability.

MaterialCobalt Chromium Alloy
WhatsApp Quote
Frequently Asked Questions

Posterior Stabilized (PS) femoral component for Freedom Total Knee System. Designed for patients with PCL deficiency, providing enhanced stability through cam-post mechanism. Features anatomical design for optimal range of motion and stability.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Freedom Total Knee System - PS Femoral Component, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Freedom Total Knee System - PS Femoral Component is constructed using Cobalt Chromium Alloy, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
